# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

`schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
- type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
  apiVersion: "2022-09-01"
  name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  kind: "functionapp"
  properties:
    siteConfig:
      appSettings:
      - name: "AzureWebJobsStorage"
        value: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value)]"
  identity:
    type: "SystemAssigned"

- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
  name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'StorageAccountContributor')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe')]" # Storage Account Contributor

- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
  name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'KeyVaultContributor')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b86a8fe4-44ce-4948-aee5-eccb2c155cd7')]" # Key Vault Contributor

- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
  name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'SQLContributor')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '9b070c94-f922-41d5-9036-c24321143bde')]" # SQL DB Contributor

- type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
  apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
  name: "[guid(parameters('functionAppName'), 'CosmosDBContributor')]"
  properties:
    principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-11-01').identity.principalId]"
    roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '5bd9cd88-fe45-4216-938b-f97437e15450')]" # Cosmos DB Account Contributor

parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string`
